slots.caption_ig:
We show our scorecard for every rank. If a dish is #1, you can see exactly why — execution 92, ingredient 88, ratio 91, value 84, ambiance 79. No black box. Disagree? You can re-weight the axes yourself.

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #FoodAI #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: Every rank in ForkFox comes with the full scorecard — 5 axes, scored 0-100. If you disagree with our weights, re-weight them yourself. The whole system is transparent because food preferences are subjective; the scoring shouldn't be hidden.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Stylized scorecard graphic with 5 axes plotted, each showing a value. Dark background with red accent line. Editorial. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 9s. Scorecard fills in axis by axis with numbers. User finger drags a slider to re-weight 'ingredient quality' up. Final rank updates. End frame: 'Your weights, not ours.'
